name: python3-stringdist
title: python3-stringdist
summary: Python library for calculating string distances using C extensions
description:
Python library for calculating string distances using C extensions
This package provides the stringdist module, which includes functions for
calculating raw and normalized versions of the following string distance
measurements:
- Levenshtein distance
- Restricted Damerau-Levenshtein distance (a.k.a. optimal string alignment
distance)
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-stringdist because Python library for calculating string distances using C extensions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-stringdist as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-stringdist with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-stringdist --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
